rationale: Proactive improvement to enable TCP keepalive by default; no spec rule involved.
SDAM spec requires heartbeat connections use HeartbeatTimeout; driver uses ConnectionTimeout instead.
Platform-specific crash: Socket.IOControl not supported on Linux; no spec rule violated.
User-reported MongoClient hang on IIS/Windows startup; thin description, no spec involvement.
LINQ expression tree translation bug for captured closure variables; no spec rule violated.
SynchronizationContext bleed across threads; internal threading bug, no spec involvement.
Documentation component; modifying change stream output examples per DRIVERS-537, not fixing driver behavior.
Build system refactor to unify .NET Framework and .NET Standard project files; no spec involvement.
Build improvement: update AssemblyInfo property specification; no spec involvement.
Build packaging: switch from .nuspec files to .csproj; purely build infrastructure.
Proactive improvement to use killCursors command for 3.2+; driver was not wrong per existing spec.
DnsClient NuGet dependency API break; packaging compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
ClusterBuilder infinite recursion due to self-referential lambda; implementation bug, no spec rule.
GeoJSON CRS field placement in $within query; driver API bug not covered by a MongoDB spec.
Update.Set generates invalid $set when BsonArray assigned to List<string> property; serialization API bug, no spec rule.
KeepAliveValues fields use ulong (8 bytes) instead of uint (4 bytes); Windows platform bug, no spec rule.
LINQ aggregate Count with predicate silently ignores predicate condition; LINQ translation bug, no spec rule.
LINQ != operator translates incorrectly for array element queries; LINQ translation bug, no spec rule.
LINQ Any(!list.Contains) generates IndexOutOfRangeException; LINQ translation bug, no spec rule.
LINQ SelectMany on nested path generates wrong $unwind path (omits parent field); LINQ bug, no spec rule.
Consecutive SelectMany calls produce empty result; LINQ pipeline generation bug, no spec rule.
DNS seedlist spec forbids port in +srv URIs; MongoUrl.ToString() was emitting a port, producing invalid connection strings.
Serialization bug in JsonDrivenTestCase prevented IDEs from running JSON spec tests on .NET Core.
NuGet install fails due to package version downgrade conflict; dependency packaging issue.
Upgrade from C#6 to C#7.x language features; purely syntactic/language improvement.
Hardcoded dependency on old System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeInformation version; build packaging fix.
Security vulnerability fix: bump System.Net.Security from 4.0.0 to 4.3.2; dependency update.
Build script fails with Package target due to missing API docs assemblies; build infrastructure issue.
ArgumentNullException due to race condition during replica set failover; implementation bug, no spec rule.
Intermittent server selection timeout on new Azure instance startup; user report, no spec rule identified.
Decimal128 unit test uses culture-dependent decimal.Parse; test code fix, not YAML spec test infrastructure.
Child of DRIVERS-550; adding spec test that only initial transaction command includes readConcern.
BsonReader.GetCurrentBsonType() API behavior in Name state; BSON reader API usability issue, not spec-specified.
Child of DRIVERS-576/SPEC-1161; adding spec test that reads ignore db/collection readConcern in transactions.
Intermittent server selection timeout when using sslverifycertificate=false; connectivity issue, no spec rule.
LINQ: support nested Any queries with outer variable references; LINQ translation improvement, no spec rule.
SSL client certificate auth fails in Azure Web App; platform/environment-specific issue, no spec rule.
SDAM spec requires lastUpdateTime tracks most recent check; WithHeartbeatException omits updating LastUpdateTimestamp.
Improvement to include LastUpdateTimestamp in ServerDescription.ToString() for diagnostics; no spec rule violated.
Reduce exception count during replica set primary election; performance/perception improvement, no spec rule.
TrySetResult runs continuations synchronously causing blocking; async implementation bug, no spec rule.
LINQ regression in 2.8.0: nested Any generates incorrect $elemMatch instead of dot-path query; LINQ translation bug.
Server-selection spec forbids selecting Unknown servers; race allows Unknown server selection when description update is async.
Per DRIVERS-624/transactions spec, StartTransaction MUST throw if topology doesn't support transactions; driver was not doing this.
Internal refactor: move pinned mongos server from Session to CoreTransaction object; no spec-defined behavior change.
Add reference documentation for SDAM logging (SdamInformationEvent); documentation improvement, no spec rule violated.
Positional operator update generates wrong field path on Linux/Docker; LINQ rendering bug, no specific spec rule named.
Proactive improvement: bump wire protocol version for MongoDB 4.2 per DRIVERS-571 spec rollout.
BSON Decimal128 spec (IEEE 754) requires preserving trailing zeros; converting 0.000M loses quantization, returning Decimal.Zero.
BsonClassMap type initializer fails on .NET Core 3.0 preview4 due to assembly loading change; platform compatibility bug.
